CustomField.description: [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: This field is deprecated] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: Supplemental_Rent_Utilization_Rate__c] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: Net_Units__c] [COMMENTS: Asana Link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1150819886958569/task/1209701316406253?focus=true Reason - We had a existing field Net_Units__c which we opened editable to end users to override. Version - v54]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Net units chargeable at normal rates.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2508_Net Units
